TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Yi-wante'-zen, u Huili-pin-Pa-dan subalan a yuncumin. . lalangawan maladid nu i tidaay a niyadu'an. atu caaya kalecad nu hinaadihay numita tu Huili-pin a luma', E-wante'-zen u abu ku palaba'tuen nuheni misangan tu luma', sapipuu't tu tada mahicaay nu dimiadan. . palekal nu tapang ŤĶ∑śļź ayda, mikinkiw tu Yi-wante'- zen tuni palekalan nu tapangan micudaday caay palutatenga tu nipakalaheci nuheni a tapang. sisa, saan masasengi ku nuheni tu Yi-wante'- zen atu Malay-zen, nakamuan nuheni a ngalngal mahida numakayniay i Huili-pin nu dumaan a niyadu'an, makayda nika lahecian nu sasakakamuan nuheni taneng miduduc tu tatapangan nuheni. Zenlea-seicia ci Wipen-huase sakamusa nuheni mahida i Taywan butud a Tau nu kankian. ÁõģŚČć, . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ . mikuliay a Yi-wante' tatamaan, itini i Sipan-ya-zen nu ayawan a caynem a secian makatukuh tu Huili-pin, Yi-wante'-zen itida tu mueneng i Padan-subalan misakaku mikuwan. caypic-wallu mihcaan enem a bulat tunem a demiad, Padan subal pulungen atu Sipan-ya Tuo-intu' subal kuwanen nu Sipan-ya tu cay-cay-lim mihcaan, itini i caywal-siwwal mihcaan siwa a bulat caywal a demiad masacacay. tawya a demiad Padan subal patideng tu limulak. wayway nu udip ťęĒŤ≥™ÁČĻŚĺĶ Yi-wante'-zen satabalay nuni kilukan i caynem-walpic a Ingkuo nu bayu'ay a kukung ci Wilen. Danpi-e. Danpi-e sakamusa kidemu mapulet, mata kalacunsean mikitabaki tu Cuokuo, apuyu ku dais, lumeni' ku kalaw, mapisek ku cihek, sanglac ku ngipen, kibetu ku bukes, atu kalaangangtangan ku banges. idaw henay ku malamelay nu Ayi-nu-zen. . tademaw atu pilisinan šļļŚŹ£ŚíĆšŅ°šĽį caysiw-siwsep mihcaan, tademaw nu Yi-wante'-zen makaala tu caylim-sep-tunem a mang nu tademaw, miki caysiw-walsep a mihcaan tu caytu-sep-siwcay a tademawan macunus tu tusip a kilacan. nina tademaw makakenih tu enemay a kakitidaan, muenengay i Pase-ku makaala tu luwal a kilacan, Yipa-yate' makaala tu tulu a kilacan, Sapu-tan makaala tu caytu a kilac, Maha-tuo cacay a kilacan, Uyugan atu Yihun-na walu a kilacan, itini i tusep-sepsep mihcaan anipicumudan misausi tu tademaw, patan subalan nu caynem-siptu-cay mang nu tademawan caylim-wal-lu-sip mang nu tademaw u Yi-wante'-zen. 1990ŚĻī, ,8ÔľÖŚú®Uyugan . tada kamu nuheni han Chirin nuIvat√°n, micidekay nu cacaya a Nadaw-yi, tusa ku sasakamuen, pasu Basco, Itbay√°ten, hucu nu pahelak musakamu atu matineng tu nakamuan nuheni a Cialu-yi atu ingu. Yi-wante'-zen u Tansu-kiw namin ku yadah, pinaay kiya ku miduducay tu lisin nu babalaki, macunus ku baluhaya nu Kili-setu a tademaw, picidekan sa u Senhui-pase-ku. šĽĖŚÄĎÁöĄśĮćŤ™ěÁ®ĪChirin nuIvat√°n, Basco,Itbay√°ten, . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Padan suba nu sumamaday a Yiwan-te' nalumaan, u Sehua-yun atu Sanhu ni sangaan, badahung han u eli', malalit nu demiad kina Yiwan-te'-zen a lalangaw. sisa Yiwan-te'-zen misuayaw tu hatidatu nipilawpes tu kakalukan, ahicanaca kya haw tu sakaudip. . kakilulan sa, hina baliyus atu acak, nipalumaan taneng misuayaw tu demiad a silamitay nu lusayan. nina palumaan pasu kuletu, tali, sunna', tayu atu tamanigi, iday itida nu hatidaay tu la'cus nu demiadan sa idaw ku sakakapah nu nipalumaan tu lusayan. Śā≥ÁĶĪšłä, . idaw kunipikinkiwan nuheni tu wayway nu aadupan, miadih tu kulit nu tapukuwan, bali atu latem a dimiad. makamelaw ku nuheni tu katalan namaka pulungan nipahabayan taluma' atu ayam itini i luma' atu i sasa mihinang, tapukuwan anu tahekal ku kamakamaan a kulitan atu kala sumasumanahan a kulitan sa u balangbangan tu sa. bayu han tu Yiwan-te'-zen u saka udip nuheni, amica kunikay tuluay a demiad katukuh tu limaan a dimiad ku saidaay, nika singlih kunuhini tani katayniyan nu timu a butingan atu pabuy nu bayu. payaman . ayawan, nisangaan tu luma' nu Yiwan-te'-zen u eli' ku yadahay nu sasangaan, anu kapahay ku aenengan nu kitidaan taneng mipuu't tu tabakiay nu baliyan. Sipan-ya-zen nikudan satu idawtu kunipatayni tu ba'tu, sasangan nuheni tu aydaay nu ba'tu a lumaan, kibetul ku nipisanga taneng misuayaw tu tabakiay nu balian. mahiniay a luma' atu Niw-si-lan, Aye-lan atu Suke-lan talakaway nu kitidaan a salengacay misengi, iday Padan subal u Huili-pin nu kakaydaan nu baliyusan. . Sipan-ya tademaw katukuh sa i Huili-pin nu
S.PHON: ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn, u ńßuir~…ĺi-pin-pa-dan subar~…ĺan a jun ¶umin. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mar~…ĺadid nu i tidaaj a nijadu Ē~ °an. atu ¶aaja kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ńßinaadińßaj numita tu ńßuir~…ĺi-pin a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, …ô-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u abu ku par~…ĺaba Ē~ °tu…ôn nuńß…ôni misaŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, sapipuu Ē~ °t tu tada mańßi ¶aaj nu dimiadan. . par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ nu tapaŇč ** ajda, mikinkiw tu ji-want…ô Ē~ °- z…ôn tuni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu tapaŇčan mi ¶udadaj ¶aaj par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu nipakar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nuńß…ôni a tapaŇč. sisa, saan masas…ôŇči ku nuńß…ôni tu ji-want…ô Ē~ °- z…ôn atu mar~…ĺaj-z…ôn, nakamuan nuńß…ôni a Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ mańßida numakajniaj i ńßuir~…ĺi-pin nu dumaan a nijadu Ē~ °an, makajda nika r~…ĺańß…ô ¶ian nu sasakakamuan nuńß…ôni tan…ôŇč midudu ¶ tu tatapaŇčan nuńß…ôni. z…ônr~…ĺ…ôa-s…ôi ¶ia ¶i wip…ôn-ńßuas…ô sakamusa nuńß…ôni mańßida i tajwan butud a tau nu kankian. **, . r~…ĺikisi ** . mikur~…ĺiaj a ji-want…ô Ē~ ° tatamaan, itini i sipan-ja-z…ôn nu ajawan a ¶ajn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian makatukuńß tu ńßuir~…ĺi-pin, ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn itida tu mu…ôn…ôŇč i padan-subar~…ĺan misakaku mikuwan. ¶ajpi ¶-war~…ĺr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan …ôn…ôm a bur~…ĺat tun…ôm a d…ômiad, padan subar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč…ôn atu sipan-ja tuo-intu Ē~ ° subar~…ĺ kuwan…ôn nu sipan-ja tu ¶aj- ¶aj-r~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, itini i ¶ajwar~…ĺ-siwwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺat ¶ajwar~…ĺ a d…ômiad masa ¶a ¶aj. tawja a d…ômiad padan subar~…ĺ patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺimur~…ĺak. wajwaj nu udip **** ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn satabar~…ĺaj nuni kir~…ĺukan i ¶ajn…ôm-war~…ĺpi ¶ a iŇčkuo nu baju Ē~ °aj a kukuŇč ¶i wir~…ĺ…ôn. danpi-…ô. danpi-…ô sakamusa kid…ômu mapur~…ĺ…ôt, mata kar~…ĺa ¶uns…ôan mikitabaki tu ¶uokuo, apuju ku dais, r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku kar~…ĺaw, mapis…ôk ku ¶ińß…ôk, saŇčr~…ĺa ¶ ku Ňčip…ôn, kib…ôtu ku buk…ôs, atu kar~…ĺaaŇčaŇčtaŇčan ku baŇč…ôs. idaw ńß…ônaj ku mar~…ĺam…ôr~…ĺaj nu aji-nu-z…ôn. . tad…ômaw atu pir~…ĺisinan ***** ¶ajsiw-siws…ôp mińß ¶aan, tad…ômaw nu ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajr~…ĺim-s…ôp-tun…ôm a maŇč nu tad…ômaw, miki ¶ajsiw-war~…ĺs…ôp a mińß ¶aan tu ¶ajtu-s…ôp-siw ¶aj a tad…ômawan ma ¶unus tu tusip a kir~…ĺa ¶an. nina tad…ômaw makak…ônińß tu …ôn…ômaj a kakitidaan, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i pas…ô-ku makaar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺuwar~…ĺ a kir~…ĺa ¶an, jipa-jat…ô Ē~ ° makaar~…ĺa tu tur~…ĺu a kir~…ĺa ¶an, sapu-tan makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajtu a kir~…ĺa ¶, mańßa-tuo ¶a ¶aj a kir~…ĺa ¶an, ujugan atu jińßun-na war~…ĺu a kir~…ĺa ¶an, itini i tus…ôp-s…ôps…ôp mińß ¶aan anipi ¶umudan misausi tu tad…ômaw, patan subar~…ĺan nu ¶ajn…ôm-siptu- ¶aj maŇč nu tad…ômawan ¶ajr~…ĺim-war~…ĺ-r~…ĺu-sip maŇč nu tad…ômaw u ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn. *****, ,***ujugan . tada kamu nuńß…ôni ńßan ¶ńßirin nui*at*n, mi ¶id…ôkaj nu ¶a ¶aja a nadaw-ji, tusa ku sasakamu…ôn, pasu bas ¶o, itbaj*t…ôn, ńßu ¶u nu pańß…ôr~…ĺak musakamu atu matin…ôŇč tu nakamuan nuńß…ôni a ¶iar~…ĺu-ji atu iŇču. ji-want…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u tansu-kiw namin ku jadańß, pinaaj kija ku midudu ¶aj tu r~…ĺisin nu babar~…ĺaki, ma ¶unus ku bar~…ĺuńßaja nu kir~…ĺi-s…ôtu a tad…ômaw, pi ¶id…ôkan sa u s…ônńßui-pas…ô-ku. ****** ¶ńßirin nui*at*n, bas ¶o,itbaj*t…ôn, . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** padan suba nu sumamadaj a jiwan-t…ô Ē~ ° nar~…ĺumaan, u s…ôńßua-jun atu sanńßu ni saŇčaan, badańßuŇč ńßan u …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ °, mar~…ĺar~…ĺit nu d…ômiad kina jiwan-t…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčaw. sisa jiwan-t…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn misuajaw tu ńßatidatu nipir~…ĺawp…ôs tu kakar~…ĺukan, ańßi ¶ana ¶a kja ńßaw tu sakaudip. . kakir~…ĺur~…ĺan sa, ńßina bar~…ĺijus atu a ¶ak, nipar~…ĺumaan tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu d…ômiad a sir~…ĺamitaj nu r~…ĺusajan. nina par~…ĺumaan pasu kur~…ĺ…ôtu, tar~…ĺi, sunna Ē~ °, taju atu tamanigi, idaj itida nu ńßatidaaj tu r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us nu d…ômiadan sa idaw ku sakakapańß nu nipar~…ĺumaan tu r~…ĺusajan. ***, . idaw kunipikinkiwan nuńß…ôni tu wajwaj nu aadupan, miadińß tu kur~…ĺit nu tapukuwan, bar~…ĺi atu r~…ĺat…ôm a dimiad. makam…ôr~…ĺaw ku nuńß…ôni tu katar~…ĺan namaka pur~…ĺuŇčan nipańßabajan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu ajam itini i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu i sasa mińßinaŇč, tapukuwan anu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku kamakamaan a kur~…ĺitan atu kar~…ĺa sumasumanańßan a kur~…ĺitan sa u bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan tu sa. baju ńßan tu jiwan-t…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u saka udip nuńß…ôni, ami ¶a kunikaj tur~…ĺuaj a d…ômiad katukuńß tu r~…ĺimaan a dimiad ku saidaaj, nika siŇčr~…ĺińß kunuńßini tani katajnijan nu timu a butiŇčan atu pabuj nu baju. pajaman . ajawan, nisaŇčaan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu jiwan-t…ô Ē~ °-z…ôn u …ôr~…ĺi Ē~ ° ku jadańßaj nu sasaŇčaan, anu kapańßaj ku a…ôn…ôŇčan nu kitidaan tan…ôŇč mipuu Ē~ °t tu tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺijan. sipan-ja-z…ôn nikudan satu idawtu kunipatajni tu ba Ē~ °tu, sasaŇčan nuńß…ôni tu ajdaaj nu ba Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺumaan, kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku nipisaŇča tan…ôŇč misuajaw tu tabakiaj nu bar~…ĺian. mańßiniaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu niw-si-r~…ĺan, aj…ô-r~…ĺan atu suk…ô-r~…ĺan tar~…ĺakawaj nu kitidaan a sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj mis…ôŇči, idaj padan subar~…ĺ u ńßuir~…ĺi-pin nu kakajdaan nu bar~…ĺijusan. . sipan-ja tad…ômaw katukuńß sa i ńßuir~…ĺi-pin nu
S.FORM: Yi-wante'-zen, u Huili-pin-Pa-dan subalan a yuncumin. . lalangawan maladid nu i tidaay a niyadu'an. atu caaya kalecad nu hinaadihay numita tu Huili-pin a luma', E-wante'-zen u abu ku palaba'tuen nuheni misangan tu luma', sapipuu't tu tada mahicaay nu dimiadan. . palekal nu tapang ŤĶ∑śļź ayda, mikinkiw tu Yi-wante'- zen tuni palekalan nu tapangan micudaday caay palutatenga tu nipakalaheci nuheni a tapang. sisa, saan masasengi ku nuheni tu Yi-wante'- zen atu Malay-zen, nakamuan nuheni a ngalngal mahida numakayniay i Huili-pin nu dumaan a niyadu'an, makayda nika lahecian nu sasakakamuan nuheni taneng miduduc tu tatapangan nuheni. Zenlea-seicia ci Wipen-huase sakamusa nuheni mahida i Taywan butud a Tau nu kankian. ÁõģŚČć, . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ . mikuliay a Yi-wante' tatamaan, itini i Sipan-ya-zen nu ayawan a caynem a secian makatukuh tu Huili-pin, Yi-wante'-zen itida tu mueneng i Padan-subalan misakaku mikuwan. caypic-wallu mihcaan enem a bulat tunem a demiad, Padan subal pulungen atu Sipan-ya Tuo-intu' subal kuwanen nu Sipan-ya tu cay-cay-lim mihcaan, itini i caywal-siwwal mihcaan siwa a bulat caywal a demiad masacacay. tawya a demiad Padan subal patideng tu limulak. wayway nu udip ťęĒŤ≥™ÁČĻŚĺĶ Yi-wante'-zen satabalay nuni kilukan i caynem-walpic a Ingkuo nu bayu'ay a kukung ci Wilen. Danpi-e. Danpi-e sakamusa kidemu mapulet, mata kalacunsean mikitabaki tu Cuokuo, apuyu ku dais, lumeni' ku kalaw, mapisek ku cihek, sanglac ku ngipen, kibetu ku bukes, atu kalaangangtangan ku banges. idaw henay ku malamelay nu Ayi-nu-zen. . tademaw atu pilisinan šļļŚŹ£ŚíĆšŅ°šĽį caysiw-siwsep mihcaan, tademaw nu Yi-wante'-zen makaala tu caylim-sep-tunem a mang nu tademaw, miki caysiw-walsep a mihcaan tu caytu-sep-siwcay a tademawan macunus tu tusip a kilacan. nina tademaw makakenih tu enemay a kakitidaan, muenengay i Pase-ku makaala tu luwal a kilacan, Yipa-yate' makaala tu tulu a kilacan, Sapu-tan makaala tu caytu a kilac, Maha-tuo cacay a kilacan, Uyugan atu Yihun-na walu a kilacan, itini i tusep-sepsep mihcaan anipicumudan misausi tu tademaw, patan subalan nu caynem-siptu-cay mang nu tademawan caylim-wal-lu-sip mang nu tademaw u Yi-wante'-zen. 1990ŚĻī, ,8ÔľÖŚú®Uyugan . tada kamu nuheni han Chirin nuIvat√°n, micidekay nu cacaya a Nadaw-yi, tusa ku sasakamuen, pasu Basco, Itbay√°ten, hucu nu pahelak musakamu atu matineng tu nakamuan nuheni a Cialu-yi atu ingu. Yi-wante'-zen u Tansu-kiw namin ku yadah, pinaay kiya ku miduducay tu lisin nu babalaki, macunus ku baluhaya nu Kili-setu a tademaw, picidekan sa u Senhui-pase-ku. šĽĖŚÄĎÁöĄśĮćŤ™ěÁ®ĪChirin nuIvat√°n, Basco,Itbay√°ten, . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Padan suba nu sumamaday a Yiwan-te' nalumaan, u Sehua-yun atu Sanhu ni sangaan, badahung han u eli', malalit nu demiad kina Yiwan-te'-zen a lalangaw. sisa Yiwan-te'-zen misuayaw tu hatidatu nipilawpes tu kakalukan, ahicanaca kya haw tu sakaudip. . kakilulan sa, hina baliyus atu acak, nipalumaan taneng misuayaw tu demiad a silamitay nu lusayan. nina palumaan pasu kuletu, tali, sunna', tayu atu tamanigi, iday itida nu hatidaay tu la'cus nu demiadan sa idaw ku sakakapah nu nipalumaan tu lusayan. Śā≥ÁĶĪšłä, . idaw kunipikinkiwan nuheni tu wayway nu aadupan, miadih tu kulit nu tapukuwan, bali atu latem a dimiad. makamelaw ku nuheni tu katalan namaka pulungan nipahabayan taluma' atu ayam itini i luma' atu i sasa mihinang, tapukuwan anu tahekal ku kamakamaan a kulitan atu kala sumasumanahan a kulitan sa u balangbangan tu sa. bayu han tu Yiwan-te'-zen u saka udip nuheni, amica kunikay tuluay a demiad katukuh tu limaan a dimiad ku saidaay, nika singlih kunuhini tani katayniyan nu timu a butingan atu pabuy nu bayu. payaman . ayawan, nisangaan tu luma' nu Yiwan-te'-zen u eli' ku yadahay nu sasangaan, anu kapahay ku aenengan nu kitidaan taneng mipuu't tu tabakiay nu baliyan. Sipan-ya-zen nikudan satu idawtu kunipatayni tu ba'tu, sasangan nuheni tu aydaay nu ba'tu a lumaan, kibetul ku nipisanga taneng misuayaw tu tabakiay nu balian. mahiniay a luma' atu Niw-si-lan, Aye-lan atu Suke-lan talakaway nu kitidaan a salengacay misengi, iday Padan subal u Huili-pin nu kakaydaan nu baliyusan. . Sipan-ya tademaw katukuh sa i Huili-pin nu
